realConstants.noSummaryBug: ALL historical messages sent when no summary exists

proposedConstants.label: Proposed (same as v1)
proposedConstants.reSummarizationApproach: growing-block (same as current, just fewer calls)

incrementalConstants.label: Incremental (new v2)
incrementalConstants.reSummarizationApproach: INCREMENTAL — only new messages since last summary + old summary

config.description: Real Langua: unbounded until turn 50, then system+summary+last40msgs, re-summarize every 15 turns
Proposed: fallback window 40msgs (BUG FIXED), first summary at turn 40, re-summarize every 20 turns, 300-tok summaries
Incremental: fallback 20msgs pre-summary, first at turn 40, incremental re-summary every 20 turns (only new msgs), 24-msg window, 300-tok summaries
Real Langua BUG: no summary triggered (< turn 50) — ALL messages sent every turn (unbounded)
System prompt + last 8 messages (sliding window)
No management: ALL messages included every turn — unbounded quadratic growth
